title: Add Plaiyground Playground AI to Dev_Tools
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Welcome to the Plaiyground
gist.blurb: A new community app just dropped! Plaiyground Playground AI lets you build web apps using multiple Pollinations models and your own Pollen credits.
gist.summary: Added Plaiyground Playground AI to the community showcase, a new developer tool for generating web apps using multiple Pollinations models.
gist.impact: Developers can now discover and use Plaiyground to configure models and generate code using their own Pollen credits.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about a 'Playground' for AI models and code generation. Metaphor: A literal playground (swings, sandbox) but made of retro computers, code blocks, and glowing screens. Polly the bee is building something in a sandbox filled with glowing code blocks.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee building a sandcastle made of glowing code blocks in a digital playground. A chunky retro monitor robot sits on a nearby swing, happily watching. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
